steps: Open the So2alGawab app on your phone
Tap "Connect TV" on the setup screen
Scan the QR code or enter the code manually
The session will start automatically on this screen

cast.modal_title: Connect your phone to the TV
cast.modal_subtitle: Open the game on TV and scan the code
cast.step_1: Open game.amrfakhri.com/tv on your TV screen
cast.step_2: A pairing screen will show a 4-character code
cast.step_3: Enter the code below to link your phone to the TV
cast.scan_title: Point at the TV QR code
cast.scan_subtitle: Hold steady over the QR on your TV to pair automatically
cast.scan_permission_denied: Camera access is needed to scan the TV QR code. Enable it in Settings.

errors.device_not_found: No device found with this code. Check the code on your screen.
errors.device_in_use: This screen is already linked to another session.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

game.not_found_sub: Check the code and try again.
